_note: Allow-list of scheduled workflows expected to be skipped/failing (#3522, ADR-020 §D5). Key = 'repo/workflow-name'; value = reason string (required — silence must be auditable). Orphaned entries (target no longer exists) are flagged 'stale-allowlist' each run so a suppression can never outlive its target.
copilot-global-skills/ticket-governance-: retired: deprecated type-prefix title metric + ephemeral job-summary-only output; RETIRE per unanimous 4/4 cross-model consensus 2026-07-07 (#3647). Workflow intentionally left disabled.
